code:
---
config:
  theme: base
  look: classic
---
stateDiagram-v2
    [Infra_WorkerNode] --> Connecting
    Connecting --> Setup : Connected to peers
    Connecting --> Shutdown : Unable to connect to peers
    Setup --> Executing : sent/received starting model
    state Executing {Infra_IngressController] --> Training
        Training --> WaitingForPeers : training step complete
        WaitingForPeers --> SecureAverageComputation : all peers ready for SAC
        SecureAverageComputation --> Training : model not complete
        SecureAverageComputation --> [Infra_LoadBalancer] : model complete
    }
    Executing --> SavingPartialModel : peer failure detected
    Executing --> TerminationCheck : execution completed
    TerminationCheck --> SavingModel : all peers reached desired accuracy
    SavingModel --> Shutdown : model saved
    SavingPartialModel --> Shutdown : partial model saved
    Shutdown --> [Infra_LoadBalancer]

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个联邦学习工作节点的完整生命周期状态图。起点是Infra_WorkerNode，它首先要尝试Connecting状态，成功连上其他节点后就进入Setup。
明白，那如果连接失败呢？是否需要处理异常路径？
对，Connecting如果Unable to connect to peers就直接Shutdown。Setup之后进入Executing，这里Executing是个复合状态，里面包含Training、WaitingForPeers和SecureAverageComputation三个子状态。
好的，Executing复合状态已创建。我注意到Training完成后会进入WaitingForPeers，然后触发SecureAverageComputation，这个SAC完成后如果model not complete就回到Training继续循环。
没错，循环训练直到model complete，这时候要输出到Infra_LoadBalancer。另外Executing外面还有两条异常路径：peer failure detected时走SavingPartialModel，execution completed时走TerminationCheck。
TerminationCheck之后呢？还有SavingPartialModel和SavingModel最终都到哪里？
TerminationCheck判断all peers reached desired accuracy就进入SavingModel，否则应该也有处理。SavingModel和SavingPartialModel最终都进入Shutdown，然后Shutdown再连到Infra_LoadBalancer。
全部完成了。我确认一下结构：Infra_IngressController在Executing内部作为Training的入口，整个复合状态通过Infra_LoadBalancer输出最终结果，异常情况下能保存部分模型，正常流程保存完整模型后关闭。
